texto: Mistakes are part of your life
autor: it is impossible to live a mistake-free life! You have made mistakes and you shall make mistakes! Just let them be fewer and smaller!
explicacao: Citação de it is impossible to live a mistake-free life! You have made mistakes and you shall make mistakes! Just let them be fewer and smaller! sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Mistakes are part of your life” articula reflexao, mehmet-murat-ildan, mistakes em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
